proxyUrl.title: Oxylabs proxy URL
proxyUrl.description: Full Oxylabs residential proxy URL, e.g. http://customer-USER-cc-MX:PASS@pr.oxylabs.io:7777. Overrides proxyConfiguration if set.

proxyConfiguration.title: Proxy configuration
proxyConfiguration.description: Apify proxy settings (fallback if proxyUrl not set)

stakeBaseUrl.title: Stake base URL
stakeBaseUrl.description: Stake homepage URL (will be used to derive sport pages). Default: https://stake.com

maxMatches.title: Max matches
maxMatches.description: Maximum matches to scrape per sport
